audit_result.proof_trace: Go map iteration order is randomized by language spec. Lines 79-82 build cellsIndices by iterating sidecarByIndex map without sorting, passing unsorted indices to RecoverCellsAndKZGProofs (line 86). The c-kzg-4844 library requires sorted indices (verified by test at fulu__kzg__recover_cells_and_kzg_proofs_test.go:45-57 which expects failure for unsorted input).
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker sends valid DataColumnSidecars via P2P. Node's reconstruction randomly orders cell indices due to map iteration, causing RecoverCellsAndKZGProofs to fail or produce incorrect recovery results, breaking PeerDAS reconstruction.

PROP-57888860-inv-006.text: Recovery cell_indices must be unique and sorted in ascending order.
